description:
Currently there are multiple foundry.toml files:
- Top-level foundry.toml
- Per-example foundry.toml files (e.g., src/examples/solidity-hello-deps/foundry.toml)

The desired approach is to have only a single top-level foundry.toml, similar to how Go, Rust, and Python dependencies are managed at the workspace root.

This would:
- Simplify dependency management
- Ensure consistent Solidity toolchain configuration across examples
- Align with the monorepo dependency management pattern used for other languages

Needs investigation:
- How to reference sources from subdirectories with a single foundry.toml
- Whether solc remappings can be configured to work across the whole repo
- Impact on soldeps-gen and the soldeps cell generation
title: Consolidate foundry.toml to top-level only
